song.title: Lord I Was Blind
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Lord, I was blind, I could not see In Thy marred visage any grace; But now the beauty of Thy face, In radiant vision dawns on me.
[V2] 2) Lord, I was deaf, I could not hear The thrilling music of Thy voice; But now I hear Thee and rejoice, And all Thine uttered words are dear.
[V3] 3) Lord, I was dumb, I could not speak The grace and glory of Thy name; But now, as touched with living flame, My lips Thine eager praises wake.
[V4] 4) Lord, I was dead, I could not stir My lifeless soul to come to Thee; But now, since Thou hast quickened me, I rise from sin’s dark sepulcher.
[V5] 5) For Thou hast made The blind to see, The deaf to hear, the dumb to speak, The dead to live—and, lo! I break The chains of my captivity.
song.author: William Tidd Matson
